title: juncus alpinus subsp. rariflorus
intro: Juncus alpinus subsp. rariflorus is a type of rush plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Juncus alpinus subsp. rariflorus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into infusions, decoctions, or teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
